hero.name: Jonathan Bessa
hero.tagline: I design, build and deploy reliable, performant and maintainable applications and platforms.

intro.title: From product to infrastructure
intro.description_1: I work across the full value chain of a web project: interface, business logic, backend, deployment, quality and reliability.
intro.description_2: My goal is to build useful products with clean foundations and enough robustness to scale over time.

focus.title: What I bring
items: Fullstack application development in JavaScript and PHP
Solid frontend and backend architecture foundations
A strong focus on performance, maintainability and clarity

featured.title: Featured projects
featured.description: A few representative projects highlighting my fullstack and DevOps approach.

items.title: Clarity
items.description: Simple interfaces, readable architecture and technical choices that make sense.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Solutions designed to last, remain maintainable and be deployed properly.

items.title: Impact
items.description: Projects built to solve real problems, not just to showcase technology.

visibility.title: Visibility & Reliability
visibility.description: You can’t fix what you can’t see. I build observable systems with logging, metrics and monitoring to ensure reliability in production.

reproduce.title: Reproducible Systems
reproduce.description: Infrastructure and environments should be consistent. I use automation and IaC principles to eliminate drift and reduce human error.

scalable.title: Scalable by Design
scalable.description: Performance and developer experience go hand in hand. I design systems that scale while staying simple to build, test and maintain.

fullstack.title: Fullstack Architecture
fullstack.description: Design and build end-to-end applications from frontend to backend with a strong focus on maintainability and performance.

backend.title: Backend & Data Systems
backend.description: Build robust APIs and data layers with efficient querying, caching strategies and scalable database design.

cloud.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
cloud.description: Deploy and operate production systems with scalable, resilient and cost-efficient cloud architectures.

cicd.title: CI/CD & Automation
cicd.description: Automate delivery pipelines to ensure fast, reliable and repeatable deployments across environments.

performance.title: Performance & Reliability
performance.description: Optimize systems for speed and uptime with monitoring, debugging and proactive performance tuning.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A selection of fullstack and DevOps projects reflecting my approach to architecture, automation and deployment.

aboutme.title: Experiences
aboutme.summary: As a full-stack developer and consultant experienced in building scalable web applications using Nuxt, Next.js, Laravel and Symfony, I design robust, high-performance, user-centered digital products. I combine engineering discipline, cloud expertise (AWS), and product thinking to turn complex requirements into reliable and maintainable solutions, with a focus on long-term (CDI) opportunities.

contact.title: Let’s build reliable web products together.
contact.description: I’m a Full-Stack Web Developer and DevOps Engineer based in Paris, currently open to a full-time permanent role (CDI). I build modern, scalable and maintainable applications, from frontend interfaces to backend services and deployment workflows.
